lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Sigmund
lines.text: I hear the Duke has a task for an adventurer. Otherwise, if you want to make yourself useful, there are always evil monsters to slay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I might just do that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any advice then?

lines.speaker: Sigmund
lines.text: I only advise the Duke. But if you want to make yourself useful, there are evil goblins to slay on the other side of the river.

lines.speaker: Sigmund
lines.text: ...And I would have gotten away with it too, if it wasn't for that pesky adventurer!
